name: Limited Runway
description: The person has some buffer, but not enough to safely absorb a large failed transition.
recommended_strategy: staged experiment instead of full leap

name: Income Floor Without Freedom
description: Income provides stability but does not automatically create life mobility.
recommended_strategy: separate survival income from exploration capital

name: Skill-Based Mobility
description: The person's skills can create optionality even when financial runway is not abundant.
recommended_strategy: convert skills into small external tests

name: Reputation Buffer
description: The person has social credibility that can reduce the cost of asking for help or opportunities.
recommended_strategy: use reputation to ask for warmer, lower-risk opportunities

name: High-Cost Transition
description: A transition is psychologically attractive but financially expensive.
recommended_strategy: build a three-step exit ladder before a full identity jump
